content:
Feeling grateful for playing basketball with Jeremy and Chloe's silly dancing. And meatballs. Mmmm meatballs. 
I get the feeling Late wants a late night chat 😴 I don't do well with these. I'm so tired. I could have slept at 8pm. Why start talking at 10 when I have to be up at 6... I struggle to get my 8 hrs
